panels.title: Gate decisions today
panels.description: Total auto_publish_gate evaluations logged in the last 24h. One per dev_diary finalize.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM audit_log WHERE event_type = 'auto_publish_gate' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Would-have-fired today
panels.description: Gate decisions where would_fire=true. While dry_run=true (default), these are the candidate auto-publishes — compare against your actual approves before flipping the gate live.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM audit_log WHERE event_type = 'auto_publish_gate' AND (details->>'would_fire')::boolean = true AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Trailing-7 mean edit distance — dev_diary
panels.description: Mean char-level edit distance across the last 7 dev_diary publishes. Trending toward 0 means operator edits are minimal — the gate is closer to ready to flip live.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(char_diff_count)::numeric, 1) AS value FROM ( SELECT char_diff_count FROM published_post_edit_metrics WHERE category = 'dev_diary' OR niche_slug = 'dev_diary' ORDER BY approved_at DESC LIMIT 7 ) t

panels.title: Gate state distribution (last 7 days)
panels.description: Where the gate landed per evaluation: pass means it would have auto-published; block_threshold/block_unclean/no_history/disabled mean it correctly held back.

targets.rawSql: SELECT details->>'gate_state' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM audit_log WHERE event_type = 'auto_publish_gate' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY details->>'gate_state' ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Edit distance per publish (per niche)
panels.description: Char-level edit distance between pre-approve and post-approve content for every published post. Lower = operator made fewer/smaller edits = system output is closer to publish-ready.

targets.rawSql: SELECT approved_at AS time, COALESCE(NULLIF(niche_slug, ''), category, 'unknown') AS metric, char_diff_count AS value FROM published_post_edit_metrics WHERE approved_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY approved_at

panels.title: Trailing-7 clean-run count by niche
panels.description: Clean = char_diff_count < dev_diary_auto_publish_max_edit_distance (default 50). Once a niche shows 3 clean runs in its trailing 7, the gate's clean-run criterion is satisfied for that niche.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(niche_slug, ''), category, 'unknown') AS niche, SUM(CASE WHEN char_diff_count < 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value FROM ( SELECT niche_slug, category, char_diff_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY COALESCE(NULLIF(niche_slug, ''), category) ORDER BY approved_at DESC) AS rn FROM published_post_edit_metrics ) t WHERE rn <= 7 GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(niche_slug, ''), category, 'unknown')

panels.title: Recent gate decisions (last 20)
panels.description: Each finalize_task evaluation. would_fire=true and dry_run=true means the gate would have auto-published if you flip dry_run off — worth comparing against your actual approve decision for this task.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS "time", task_id, details->>'gate_state' AS gate_state, (details->>'would_fire')::boolean AS would_fire, (details->>'dry_run')::boolean AS dry_run, ROUND((details->>'quality_score')::numeric, 1) AS quality_score, ROUND((details->>'threshold')::numeric, 1) AS threshold, details->>'reason' AS reason FROM audit_log WHERE event_type = 'auto_publish_gate' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20
